chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-292 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.03.2023. None present for petitioner. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General along with Inspector Khalil Ahmed Shah SHO Khybrani, SIP Muhammad Ali Khaskheli PS Tando Bago, SIP Mumtaz Ali PS Tando Ghulam Ali, SIP Aziz Ahmed PS Mithi, and SIP Mumtaz Khoso PS Tando Ghulam Hyder. -.-.-. Comments filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9 & 10 are taken on record. Inspector Khalil Ahmed Shah SHO Khybrani, SIP Muhammad Ali Khaskheli PS Tando Bago, SIP Mumtaz Ali PS Tando Ghulam Ali, SIP Aziz Ahmed PS Mithi, and SIP Mumtaz Khoso PS Tando Ghulam Hyder present submit that there are in all four cases registered against sons of petitioner who are habitual criminal stealing digital batteries from mobile towers. Be that as it may, since no one is present on behalf of the petitioners this petition is dismissed JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
